parameters.query: SELECT id, callback_id, execution_id, resume_url, status, expires_at, payload FROM hitl_sessions WHERE callback_id = '{{ $json.callbackId }}' AND status = 'pending' LIMIT 1;
UPDATE hitl_sessions SET status = 'resolved', resolved_at = NOW() WHERE callback_id = '{{ $('Merge Session And Callback').first().json.callbackId }}' RETURNING id, callback_id, status;

INSERT INTO conversation_state (chat_id, state, payload, updated_at) VALUES ({{ $json.chatId }}, 'awaiting_edit', jsonb_build_object('draft', {{ JSON.stringify($json.payload && $json.payload.draft ? $json.payload.draft : '') }}::text, 'notionBlockId', {{ JSON.stringify($json.payload && $json.payload.notionBlockId ? $json.payload.notionBlockId : '') }}::text, 'topic', {{ JSON.stringify($json.payload && $json.payload.topic ? $json.payload.topic : 'General') }}::text, 'callbackId', {{ JSON.stringify($json.callbackId) }}::text), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET state = 'awaiting_edit', payload = EXCLUDED.payload, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, chat_id, state;
SELECT id, state, payload FROM conversation_state WHERE chat_id = {{ $json.chat_id }} AND state = 'awaiting_edit' LIMIT 1;
UPDATE conversation_state SET state = 'idle', payload = '{}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE chat_id = {{ $('Prepare Edit Publish').first().json.chatId }};

parameters.query: SELECT config_key, config_value FROM brand_config WHERE brand_id='AGS' AND config_key LIKE 'auto_publish%' ORDER BY config_key;

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all(); const chatId=$('Route By Update Type').first().json.chat_id; let L=['Auto-publish ustawienia:','']; for(const r of rows){ if(r.json.config_key) L.push(r.json.config_key+' = '+r.json.config_value); } L.push(''); L.push('Zmiana: /set <klucz> <wartosc>'); return [{json:{chatId,reply:L.join('\n')}}];

parameters.jsCode: const text=$json.text||''; const parts=text.trim().split(/\s+/); return [{json:{key:parts[1]||'', chatId:$json.chat_id}}];

parameters.query: SELECT config_value FROM brand_config WHERE brand_id='AGS' AND config_key = '{{ $json.key }}';

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all(); const key=$('Parse Get Key').first().json.key; const chatId=$('Parse Get Key').first().json.chatId; const val=(rows[0]&&rows[0].json&&rows[0].json.config_value)?rows[0].json.config_value:'(nie znaleziono)'; return [{json:{chatId,reply:key+' = '+val}}];

parameters.text: ={{ $json.reply }}

parameters.query: SELECT config_value FROM brand_config WHERE brand_id='AGS' AND config_key='admin_chat_ids';

parameters.jsCode: const adminRow=$input.first().json; let adminList=[]; try{adminList=JSON.parse(adminRow.config_value||'[]');}catch(e){} const reqText=$('Route By Update Type').first().json.text||''; const chatId=$('Route By Update Type').first().json.chat_id; const authorized=adminList.map(String).includes(String(chatId)); const m=reqText.trim().match(/^\/set\s+(\S+)\s+([\s\S]+)$/); let key='',value='',ok=false,error=''; if(!authorized){error='Brak uprawnien. Tylko admin moze zmieniac ustawienia.';} else if(!m){error='Format: /set <klucz> <wartosc>';} else { key=m[1]; value=m[2].trim(); const allowed=['auto_publish_enabled','auto_publish_priorities','auto_publish_timeout_min']; if(!allowed.includes(key)){error='Nieznany klucz. Dozwolone: '+allowed.join(', ');} else if(key==='auto_publish_enabled'){ if(value!=='true'&&value!=='false')error='Wartosc musi byc true lub false'; else ok=true; } else if(key==='auto_publish_priorities'){ try{const a=JSON.parse(value); if(!Array.isArray(a)||!a.every(x=>['high','normal','low'].includes(x)))error='Tablica JSON z high/normal/low, np. ["high"]'; else ok=true;}catch(e){error='Niepoprawny JSON. Przyklad: ["high"]';} } else if(key==='auto_publish_timeout_min'){ try{const o=JSON.parse(value); if(typeof o!=='object'||Array.isArray(o)||!Object.values(o).every(v=>typeof v==='number'))error='Obiekt JSON z liczbami, np. {"high":30}'; else ok=true;}catch(e){error='Niepoprawny JSON. Przyklad: {"high":30}';} } } const valueEsc=value.replace(/'/g,"''"); return [{json:{ok,key,value,valueEsc,chatId,error}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO brand_config (brand_id, config_key, config_value, version, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES ('AGS', '{{ $json.key }}', '{{ $json.valueEsc }}', 1, 'telegram:{{ $json.chatId }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (brand_id, config_key) DO UPDATE SET config_value=EXCLUDED.config_value, version=brand_config.version+1, updated_by=EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at=NOW() RETURNING config_key, config_value;

parameters.text: ={{ 'Ustawione: ' + $('Parse And Authorize Set').first().json.key + ' = ' + $('Parse And Authorize Set').first().json.value }}
={{ 'Odrzucone: ' + $('Parse And Authorize Set').first().json.error }}

WITH src AS (SELECT content FROM inspirations WHERE id = {{ $json.ideaId }}), upd AS (UPDATE inspirations SET status='queued_post', processed_at=NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.ideaId }}) INSERT INTO post_queue (content, status) SELECT content, 'queued' FROM src RETURNING id;
UPDATE inspirations SET status='discarded', processed_at=NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.ideaId }};
